task: Recover the hidden next symbol in a symbolic sequence. You are given many full training sequences to learn the sequence structure, and a set of test items; each test item is the left-context window immediately preceding a hidden position (right context is withheld). Predict the single symbol that comes next. Some earlier hidden positions inside a context appear as 'MASK'. The next symbol is genuinely uncertain (branch points), so exact prediction has an irreducible ceiling.

files.test.json: test items ([{item_id, context}]); predict the next symbol after each context
files.sample_submission.csv: template with a dummy most-common-symbol baseline
